# mybusiness-crm.ru llms.txt

- [CRM System PDF](https://mybusiness-crm.ru/lic.pdf): Provides a PDF download for a business CRM system.
- [My-Business CRM Overview](https://mybusiness-crm.ru): Promote and explain the features of the My-Business CRM system for small and medium businesses.
- [My-Business CRM Purchase](https://mybusiness-crm.ru/kipit.html): Offers CRM license purchase options and pricing details.
